title: ilex crenata f. tricocca
intro: Ilex crenata f. tricocca is a lesser-known variety of the Japanese holly, known for its small, dark green leaves and red berries. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and ease respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Ilex crenata f. tricocca include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although its preparations and uses may vary depending on the region and cultural practices.
